description: LLM tests error recovery — partial agent results saved when script throws

criteria.name: first_phase_completes
criteria.description: First phase with an agent completes successfully before the throw
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows at least one agent completed with 'done' status.

criteria.name: throws_deliberately
criteria.description: Script has a deliberate throw after agent completion
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes throw new Error(...) after an agent completes.

criteria.name: recovery_manifest
criteria.description: Output contains recovery directory path and manifest
criteria.pass_condition: Output includes 'Recovery directory:' with a path and mentions 'Completed agent' or 'manifest.json'.

criteria.name: completed_results_saved
criteria.description: Completed agent results are persisted to recovery files
criteria.pass_condition: Output lists completed agents with result file paths.

criteria.name: graceful_failure
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows 'Workflow failed' not a crash. Recovery info is present.
